transforms: Selected only the accepted held candidate from the post-seed candidate batch.
Confirmed the record is distinct from the existing private Al-Shahba University record.
Kept website null because no approved public source confirmed an official website.
v0.1.11 restored the production boundary to records present in the internal comparison control list and moved non-control-list additions back to the held-candidate backlog.
reviewNotes: Reviewed public-source candidate batch. Superseded by v0.1.11 because the candidate is not present in the internal comparison control list; retained in the held-candidate backlog.
